use_for: tasks that need current external knowledge
vision inspection when accuracy risk is acceptable

hybrid.default: API orchestrates; Ollama handles compact/private subwork when VRAM is safe.
local_preflight: check GPU memory before local LLM work
avoid loading local models if used VRAM would exceed 9728 MiB
prefer qwen3.5:4b or qwen3.5:2b when other GPU workloads are active

api.default: API-first for orchestration, long context, and high reliability. Ollama remains available for private low-risk work.

local.default: Ollama-first for compact/private work. API remains fallback for long context, external knowledge, or complex synthesis.
